description:
We are an innovative Australian based company developing and delivering products and services to the rapidly changing electricity market, with a focus on using renewable energy to reduce household energy consumption and bills.

We are searching for skilled full stack software engineers to join our high performing engineering team. In this role, you’ll dive deep into complex web applications, DevOps, real-time IoT data telemetry, and scalable system architecture.

If you’re a self-driven developer who thrives on solving complex problems and learning on the fly, reach out.

Mandatory

Excellent problem solving, critical thinking, analytical and development skills

Development experience working on internet based technology products and services

Experienced with a range of web/cloud technologies: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL databases (e.g. PostgreSQL)

Familiar with design and development in an Agile environment

Very comfortable using git and Linux’s CLI

Excellent communication and teamwork skills

Degree qualified in engineering or computer science

You must be an Australian citizen, or hold a valid work permit or visa for work in Australia

Desirable (experience with some of the following would be an advantage)

Full stack software development experience

Writing asynchronous software with NodeJS and WebSocket technologies

Experience using Linux Servers in an AWS environment

Experience with AWS services

Experience with time series databases (e.g. OpenTSDB)

Data mining/analysis and machine learning

Billing engines, MSATS and/or AEMO APIs

This is a genuine opportunity to work in a rapidly changing environment focused on new and innovative energy-based products and services.

Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Right to live and work

You must have the right to live and work in this location to apply for this job.
